page_title: Reconnaissance faciale et interdiction commerciale de stade : la CNIL adresse un avertissement à un club sportif | CNIL
cautious_finding: The live CNIL warning page remains reachable and exposes generic sanction-procedure navigation plus the sanctions index, but no direct case-specific PDF, deliberation, or companion warning record was visible in this bounded HTML pass.
paper_thesis_use: Reviewer-safe note for Table 1A / Figure 8 / methods prose showing that France currently remains a warning-page-depth sidecar even after a fresh link-class audit.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Reopen only if a case-specific CNIL warning, sanction, deliberation, or court-facing record becomes visible on CNIL or another clearly official surface.
